hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.github/workflows/*|.github/workflows/*) jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"ask",permissionDecisionReason:"Editing a CI/publish workflow. publish.yml is intentionally disabled pending PyPI trusted-publishing setup — confirm before changing."}}';; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
